title: Gina manifest.json
description: Project manifest — the root registry of all bundles in a Gina project. Lives at the project root alongside env.json and package.json.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

name.description: Project name. Must match the @<project> identifier used in CLI commands.

scope.description: Default runtime scope for this project.

rootDomain.description: Root domain or hostname used as the base for bundle URLs.

bundles.description: Registry of all bundles in this project. Each key is the bundle name.

_comment.description: Optional documentation comment. Ignored at runtime.

version.description: Bundle release version in semver format.

tag.description: Compact version tag derived from the version string (dots removed).

gina_version.description: Pin this bundle to a specific installed gina framework version. When set, the spawned bundle process uses this version instead of the socket server's version. Validated against ~/.gina/main.json before start. Can be overridden at start time with the --gina-version CLI flag.

src.description: Path to the bundle source directory, relative to the project root.

link.description: Path to the bundle symlink under the project bundles directory, relative to the project root.

releases.description: Release build paths, keyed by scope then environment.

additionalProperties.description: Scope-level release map. Each key is an environment name.

target.description: Path to the compiled release directory, relative to the project root.
